title: schmidtottia involucrata
intro: Schmidtottia involucrata, also known as the Schmidtottia plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae. It is a tropical plant native to the Pacific Islands, particularly in Hawaii and the Cook Islands, and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Schmidtottia involucrata include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In terms of herbal preparations, Schmidtottia involucrata can be made into a decoction or infusion, often combined with other medicinal plants, to create a tea or tonic that can be used to treat various health issues.
